notes: Chunks 32+33+34+Blog Day 8 complete 2026-06-06. Chunk 32: Template B (Visual Journey), 22 new routes Middle East (Bahrain/Israel/Jordan/Kuwait/Oman UK+US bidirectional) and Eastern Europe (Czech Republic/Poland/Ireland UK inbound). CDC high-risk for Jordan/Israel outbound; AHC required for all UK inbound. Chunk 33: Template C (Comparison Brief), 22 new routes Scandinavia-to-US (Sweden/Norway/Denmark), India-to-EU5 (Netherlands/Switzerland/Italy/Portugal/South Korea), Japan-to-EU5 (Netherlands/Switzerland/Italy/Portugal/South Korea), Africa-to-US (Kenya/Nigeria/Egypt), UK-to-Ireland, Philippines-to-South Korea, South Korea-to-Italy/Portugal/Japan, Indonesia-to-Netherlands. Chunk 34: Template D (Conversational Q&A), 25 routes Brazil/Indonesia/Malaysia/Mexico to Italy/Japan/Netherlands/Portugal/South Korea/Switzerland; Italy-to-South Korea; Thailand-to-South Korea (committed in merge). Blog Day 8: cheap-pet-transport-honest-look.md (1800 words, Marcus Webb, cost transparency angle). Routes 5416 (all on disk). Tier A remaining: 90 -> 15. Next chunk 35 (Template E, Data-Forward, Tier A). Blog Day 9 next.

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
